risk_reason_groups.title: Suspicious Domain Indicators With Network Permission
examples: Suspicious domain indicators with network permission

rule_risk.verdict_note: Some entries are informational runtime observations and calibration notes; they explain context but are not independent malicious proofs.

calibration.note: False-positive resistant calibration: permissions, domains, exported components, and soft static indicators cannot produce Critical 100% without hard malicious evidence.
